17692611.summary: Pershing Square Holdings purchased 37,378 public shares on 16 July 2026 through Jefferies at an average price of $52.91 USD (3,921 pence). The buyback comprised 25,713 shares on LSE (PSH ticker) and 11,665 shares (PSHD ticker). The purchase price sits below the calculated NAV of $77.06 per share as of 14 July. Following the transaction, 173.8 million public shares remain outstanding, with 37.1 million shares held in treasury.
17692611.brief: PSH repurchased 37,378 shares at average $52.91 on 16 July 2026.
17692611.take: Share repurchase at a discount to NAV is modestly accretive to remaining shareholders. Routine capital management activity; signals management confidence but represents minimal market-moving catalyst.

17692616.summary: Societe Generale notified on 16 July 2026 of a major holding acquisition in Intermediate Capital Group PLC, increasing its voting rights from 4.46% to 6.34%. The position comprises 17.68m shares (6.26% direct voting rights) plus 228,528 voting rights through cash-settled contracts for difference expiring between December 2027 and May 2029. Total voting rights held: 17.9m shares. This represents a ~190 basis point increase from the previous notification threshold.
17692616.brief: Societe Generale increases ICG holding to 6.34% voting rights, crossing major shareholder threshold on 15 July 2026.
17692616.take: Routine disclosure of major shareholding change. Market likely views this as a neutral event—institutional accumulation with no control implications unless stake rises further toward 10% threshold.

17692618.summary: Young & Co's Brewery executed its announced share buyback programme during 13-16 July 2026 through Peel Hunt on the London Stock Exchange. The company purchased 7,649 Non-voting shares at a volume-weighted average price of 718.24p (range 716-748p) for cancellation, and 10,250 A shares at 920.76p average (range 910-931p) for treasury. Post-transaction, the company will have 22,569,749 Non-voting shares and 38,037,755 A shares in issue.
17692618.brief: Young & Co's Brewery completes share buyback, purchasing 7,649 Non-voting and 10,250 A shares between 13-16 July.
17692618.take: Routine capital management activity consistent with announced buyback programme; modest transaction size suggests measured approach to share reduction, likely neutral market reception.

17692620.summary: Foresight Group Holdings Limited bought back 214,238 ordinary shares between 10-16 July 2026 via Berenberg, with prices ranging from 445.50p to 475.00p. The volume-weighted average prices ranged from 451.98p to 471.64p across five trading days. Total treasury holdings now stand at 5,020,091 shares (non-voting), with 111,327,712 shares carrying voting rights out of 116,347,803 in issue. Cumulative buybacks under the current programme total 6,671,775 shares.
17692620.brief: Foresight Group purchased 214,238 shares at 452-475p under its April 2025 buyback programme.
17692620.take: Routine capital management disclosure showing consistent buyback execution. Share prices trending upward (472p+ on final day) may signal confidence, but buyback programmes are typically pre-authorised and non-event unless scale or pace changes materially.
